description: persistBillingEvent inspects the err parameter and propagates it; persistDebugEvent and persistMetricEvent ignore err and unconditionally call cb(null, id).

findings.rationale: persistBillingEvent branches on the err parameter while the other two writers ignore it entirely. The err-check is load-bearing on the billing path: silently dropping a write on EROFS/ENOSPC produces direct revenue loss. Unifying onto a shared writer that drops the err inspection re-introduces silent failures on disk pressure.
